description: You are a DevOps engineer maintaining a personal knowledge base in TiddlyWiki. Your wiki already contains four operational procedure tiddlers: "Service Health Check Procedure", "Database Failover Steps", "Notification Escalation Matrix", and "Post-Incident Review Template". Create a new tiddler titled "Incident Response Runbook" that assembles these procedures into a single comprehensive runbook using transclusion. The new tiddler must be tagged "Runbook" and "Operations" and include a custom field "priority" with the value "critical". Include an introductory paragraph explaining the purpose of the runbook, followed by transclusions of the four existing procedure tiddlers in the following order: "Service Health Check Procedure", "Database Failover Steps", "Notification Escalation Matrix", and "Post-Incident Review Template". Use at least three section headers to organize the transcluded content.
